modifiers: Draft, then everyone randomizes roles!
A-M Champions only!
N-Z Champions only!
Male Champions only!
Female Champions only!
No bans!
All Random!
Demacia vs Noxus! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Zaun vs Piltover! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Void vs Shurima! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Bilgewater vs Shadow Isles! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Targon vs Ixtal! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Ionia vs Noxus! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Freljord vs Bandle City! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Marksmen/Supports vs Mages! (Lower Elo team pick side!)
Tanks vs Fighters! (Lower Elo Team picks side!)
You cant pick champs starting with the same letter (For both teams!)
Public Space! (Nobody can take Flash!)
Play 5 1v1s with all players! Match MMR as best as possible, best of five!
Dark Map! (Everyone must take sweeper and stay on it!) (No control wards or support item wards)
I see you! (Everyone must take farsight trinket ASAP and stay on it!)
Everywhere is warded!!! (Everyone must take and stay on yellow trinket!)
Side Quest! (Pick champions with rivalry quests. You can't ban champs with quests and at least 1 must be possible this game!)
Ranged Riot! (Play only ranged champions)
Melee Madness! (Play only melee champions)
'Normal' Game! (Don't put points into your ultimate!)
Keystone Collector! (Both teams choose a keystone. The teams must all use their chosen keystone!)
Summoner Speciality! (Both teams choose a summoner spell other than flash. The teams must all use their chosen summoner!)
Specialists! (Both teams choose a class of champions. They must all play champions from that class!)
Stackin'! (Both teams play champions that can infinitely stack! No banning infinitely stacking champions!)
Where's your sword? Don't need it. (Don't put points in one of your basic abilities)
Male vs Female! (Lower Elo chooses side!)
Humans vs Everything else! (Lower Elo Chooses Side!)
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion! (Every champion on your team must be from a different region)
Lane Synergy! (Mid + JG pick from the same region and Bot + Sup pick from the same region!)
Comms Breakdown! (No VC or pings, only communicate through all chat!)
#mellowcholymode! (No VC or chat, only pings!)
Draw Your Draft! (Each player must draw the champion they want to ban, then draw the champion they want to pick)
Award Ceremony! (Choose an MVP for the enemy team after the game!)
Spirit Blossom vs Blood Moon! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Christmas vs Halloween! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
KDA/Heartsteel/True Damage/Pentakill Champions! (Don't ban any champions)
New Years vs Valentines! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Coven vs Star Guardians! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Pool Party vs Infernal! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Night/Dawnbringers vs Cosmic/Dark Star! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Day Job vs Arcade/Bees (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Elderwood/Anima Squad vs Project (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Power of Friendship! (Everyone must be in the same VC!)
Monochromatic! (Everyone must pick a colour, and base their build around it!) (Blue -> Arcane Comet, Ghost + Cleanse, Essence Reaver + Muramana (etc)
